description: You are a Nurse Practitioner conducting a follow-up visit for patient Dwight Dach (date of birth: March 21, 1998) on 2025-03-15. Using FreeMED (http://localhost/freemed/, login: admin / admin), document the clinical encounter by adding Essential Hypertension (ICD-9 401.9) and Prediabetes (ICD-9 790.29) to the patient's problem list with an onset date of 2025-03-15. Record the patient's vital signs: blood pressure 142/88 mmHg, heart rate 82 bpm, temperature 98.6°F, weight 198 lbs, and height 70 inches. Issue a prescription for Lisinopril 10mg (quantity 30 tablets, dosage '1 tablet daily', 2 refills) and write a clinical progress note documenting the hypertension diagnosis, the prediabetes finding, and the plan to start Lisinopril.
